# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    router "Base" {
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r3" {
            port 1/1/c1/1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.1.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
        ospf 0 {
            admin-state enable
            router-id 1.1.1.1
            preference 20
            area 0.0.0.0 {
                interface "system" {
                    interface-type point-to-point
                }
                interface "to-r3" {
                    interface-type point-to-point
                    metric 100
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
